canonical_boundaries.post_action_truth: UI action result is not account truth; accounts screen refreshes canonical accounts readonly packet after action.
canonical_boundaries.terminal_semantics: retire is terminal lifecycle retirement, not demotion, deletion, or reactivation.

eligible_when: account exists in accounts list packet
blocked_before_lifecycle_command_when: raw adapter command id from browser

ui_contract.non_retired_accounts: render retire_account as a terminal lifecycle action

ui_contract.fixture_mode: account actions remain disabled unless live action metadata allows them
ui_contract.copy_guard: retire wording is terminal lifecycle retirement/removal from service, not delete or reactivation
ui_contract.confirmation: uses existing confirmation path with confirmation_required metadata; global confirmation redesign is deferred
